calendar.matters:
Petition For Instructions To Determine Existence Of The Revocable Living Trust Of Marie Howard, Dated February 12, 2003
Off Calendar May-22-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances; Delonda Coleman appearing via zoom for and with Petitioner Jacqueline A. Dyson appearing via zoom.
John DiAna appearing via zoom for and with Michael A. Howard appearing via zoom.
Carolyn Howard beneficiary of the trust appearing via zoom.

Mrs. Coleman stated that she has not responded to the objections, that she spoke with Mr. DiAna, that there was a mis interpretation of her client's position, that her client is asking for instructions and that her client is agreeable to amending the trust, not revoking. The Petition for instructions to determine existence of the revocable trust, etc., is taken under submission with intent to grant and to find that the Will executed by Marie Howard on 9/17/2018 is an amendment to the trust and therefore, the beneficiaries shall be the five children of Marie Howard in equal shares. Mrs. Coleman will prepare a form of order and provide it to Mr. DiAna.

Judge: Stephen Murphy; Clerk: Ateesh Datt. Deputy: H. Singh. Not reported.
